© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public 
CMEMS-MED-OMI-PUM-CLIMATE_OHC 
Issue 1.4 – November 2025 
DATA ACCESS 
 
After registration, you will be able to download our data. To assist you, our 
HelpCenter is available, and more specifically its section about download. 
 
Information on operational issues on products and services can be found on 
our User Notification Service. If needed, you can contact us . 
 
 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the Copernicus Marine Service  Ocean Monitoring 
Indicator (OMI) OMI_CLIMATE_OHC_MEDSEA_area_averaged_anomalies. It provides a time 
series of Ocean Heat Content (OHC) anomalies area-averaged over the Mediterranean Sea 
(30°N, 46°N; 6°W, 36°E), between 0 and 700 meters depth, excluding regions where the seafloor 
is shallower than 300  meters (see the QUID document for more details on the calculation 
method). 
The product consists of a one-dimensional

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for the Copernicus Marine Service Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI) OMI_CLIMATE_OHC_MEDSEA_area_averaged_anomalies, providing details on the time series of Ocean Heat Content (OHC) anomalies area-averaged over the Mediterranean Sea between 0 and 700 meters depth.
